summary: Iteration 3: Backend testing completed for Loyalty Program, Promotions CRUD, Financial Reports, and Service Photos. Fixed bug in loyalty add-points endpoint where LoyaltyPoints model wasn't initialized with default values when creating new records. All 39 tests passed, 1 skipped.
seed_data_creation: Created loyalty test data: phone TEST_5511888888888 with points transactions for full flow test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 3 are working correctly. Fixed bug: LoyaltyPoints model initialization needed explicit points=0, total_earned=0, total_redeemed=0 when creating new records, otherwise Python += operator fails on NoneType. Tested: Loyalty config CRUD, clients list, public lookup by phone, add-points, redeem, transaction history. Promotions CRUD working. Financial reports (day/week/month), top services, daily breakdown all working. Service photos upload/delete working. Appointment complete loyalty integration skipped due to no pending appointments with client_phone.

tested_features.loyalty_config_get: PASS - GET /api/loyalty/config returns config with default 100pt threshold
tested_features.loyalty_clients_list: PASS - GET /api/loyalty/clients returns clients with points
tested_features.loyalty_client_lookup: PASS - GET /api/loyalty/client/{phone} returns points (public, no auth)
tested_features.loyalty_add_points: PASS - POST /api/loyalty/add-points adds points to client (BUG FIXED)
tested_features.loyalty_redeem: PASS - POST /api/loyalty/redeem redeems 100 points for reward
tested_features.loyalty_redeem_insufficient: PASS - POST /api/loyalty/redeem returns 400 when points < threshold
tested_features.promotions_all: PASS - GET /api/promotions/all returns barber's promotions (auth required)

loyalty_add_points_500_error.issue: POST /api/loyalty/add-points returned 500 Internal Server Error when adding points to a new client
loyalty_add_points_500_error.root_cause: LoyaltyPoints model creation didn't initialize points, total_earned, total_redeemed fields. Python's += operator failed: 'NoneType' + 'int'
loyalty_add_points_500_error.fix: Added explicit initialization: points=0, total_earned=0, total_redeemed=0 when creating new LoyaltyPoints record in both add_points_manual() and award_loyalty_points() functions

mocked_apis_note: WhatsApp Business API is MOCKED - will fail gracefully without real Meta API credentials
